meta.summary: RepeatMasker screens DNA sequences for interspersed repeats and low-complexity DNA, producing repeat annotations and masked FASTA output.
meta.description: RepeatMasker screens DNA sequences for interspersed repeats and low-complexity DNA, producing repeat annotations and masked FASTA output.

test: RepeatMasker -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'RepeatMasker version 4.2.3' >/dev/null && rmblastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'rmblastn: 2.17.1+' >/dev/null && trf -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tandem Repeats Finder, Version 4.09' >/dev/null && nhmmer -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && twoBitInfo 2>&1 | grep -F 'twoBitInfo' >/dev/null && bedToBigBed 2>&1 | grep -F 'bedToBigBed' >/dev/null && test "${BLAST_USAGE_REPORT}" = 'false'

RepeatMasker -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'RepeatMasker is a program that screens DNA sequences' >/dev/null && RepeatMasker -help 2>&1 | grep -F -- '-lib' >/dev/null && ProcessRepeats -help 2>&1 | grep -F 'ProcessRepeats' >/dev/null

famdb.py -i /opt/RepeatMasker/Libraries/famdb info 2>&1 | grep -F 'Database: Dfam' >/dev/null && famdb.py -i /opt/RepeatMasker/Libraries/famdb info 2>&1 | grep -F 'Version : 3.9' >/dev/null && famdb.py -i /opt/RepeatMasker/Libraries/famdb info 2>&1 | grep -F '1 Partitions Present' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-smoke && printf '>ToyRepeat#DNA/Toy
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > repeats.fa && printf '>seq1
NNNNNACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGTNNNNN
' > input.fa && RepeatMasker -pa 1 -engine rmblast -lib repeats.fa -dir out input.fa >/tmp/taf-repeatmasker-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && test -s out/input.fa.out && test -s out/input.fa.masked && grep -F 'ToyRepeat' out/input.fa.out >/dev/null && grep -F 'seq1' out/input.fa.masked >/dev/null && grep -F 'NNNNN' out/input.fa.masked >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-gff-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-gff-smoke && printf '>ToyRepeat#DNA/Toy
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > repeats.fa && printf '>seq1
NNNNNACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGTNNNNN
' > input.fa && RepeatMasker -pa 1 -engine rmblast -lib repeats.fa -gff -dir out input.fa >/tmp/taf-repeatmasker-gff-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && test -s out/input.fa.out && test -s out/input.fa.out.gff && grep -F 'Target "Motif:ToyRepeat"' out/input.fa.out.gff >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-utils-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-utils-smoke && printf '>ToyRepeat#DNA/Toy
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > repeats.fa && printf '>seq1
NNNNNACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGTNNNNN
' > input.fa && RepeatMasker -pa 1 -engine rmblast -lib repeats.fa -dir out input.fa >/tmp/taf-repeatmasker-utils-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && rmOutToGFF3.pl out/input.fa.out > out/input.fa.util.gff && test -s out/input.fa.util.gff && grep -F 'ToyRepeat' out/input.fa.util.gff >/dev/null && buildSummary.pl out/input.fa.out > out/input.fa.summary && test -s out/input.fa.summary && grep -F 'ToyRepeat' out/input.fa.summary >/dev/null

upstream.name: RepeatMasker
upstream.license: OSL-2.1 with bundled Dfam/FamDB CC0 code/data notices, RMBlast/NCBI components, and UCSC command-line utilities
upstream.citation: Smit, Hubley, and Green; Dfam Consortium; Camacho et al. 2009 for BLAST+

meta.summary: RepeatMasker screens DNA sequences for interspersed repeats and low-complexity DNA, producing repeat annotations and masked FASTA output.
meta.description: RepeatMasker screens DNA sequences for interspersed repeats and low-complexity DNA, producing repeat annotations and masked FASTA output.

test: RepeatMasker -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'RepeatMasker version 4.2.3' >/dev/null && rmblastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'rmblastn: 2.17.1+' >/dev/null && trf -v 2>&1 | grep -F 'Tandem Repeats Finder, Version 4.09' >/dev/null && nhmmer -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'HMMER' >/dev/null && twoBitInfo 2>&1 | grep -F 'twoBitInfo' >/dev/null && bedToBigBed 2>&1 | grep -F 'bedToBigBed' >/dev/null && test "${BLAST_USAGE_REPORT}" = 'false' && test "${PAGER}" = 'cat'

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-smoke && printf '>ToyRepeat#DNA/Toy

' > input.fa && RepeatMasker -pa 1 -engine rmblast -lib repeats.fa -gff -dir out input.fa >/tmp/taf-repeatmasker-gff-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && test -s out/input.fa.out && test -s out/input.fa.out.gff && grep -F 'Target "Motif:ToyRepeat"' out/input.fa.out.gff >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-utils-smoke/out && cd /tmp/taf-repeatmasker-utils-smoke && printf '>ToyRepeat#DNA/Toy
ACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGT
' > repeats.fa && printf '>seq1
NNNNNACGTTGCATGTCAGTACGATCGTACGATGCTAGCTAGGATCCGATCGTNNNNN
' > input.fa && RepeatMasker -pa 1 -engine rmblast -lib repeats.fa -dir out input.fa >/tmp/taf-repeatmasker-utils-smoke/run.log 2>&1 && rmOutToGFF3.pl out/input.fa.out > out/input.fa.util.gff && test -s out/input.fa.util.gff && grep -F 'ToyRepeat' out/input.fa.util.gff >/dev/null && buildSummary.pl out/input.fa.out > out/input.fa.summary && test -s out/input.fa.summary && grep -F 'ToyRepeat' out/input.fa.summary >/dev/null
